rationale_top3: Nature Score (18/20): Exceptional bushland setting within Lane Cove National Park provides a peaceful, natural environment close to Sydney Location Score (10/10): Outstanding proximity to Sydney CBD while maintaining a secluded bush retreat atmosphere Value Score (10/10): Strong perceived value for a holiday park in such a premium Sydney location
rationale_honourable: Cleanliness Score (9/10): Well-maintained facilities and grounds Site Size Score (7/10): Adequate site spacing for the location
water_fun: Basic swimming pool available but not the main feature of this bushland-focused park
kids_play: Limited children's entertainment facilities - better suited for nature walks and outdoor exploration than structured play activities
pet_detail: No evidence of pet-friendly accommodations based on zero pet score
best_for: Nature lovers, Sydney visitors seeking alternative to hotels, weekend getaways, bushwalkers
